title: Clearer Nether
description: Makes the nether less eyestraining, useful when digging for ancient debris!
body:
# Clearer Nether

Features:
- Smoother netherrack (and ores)
- Easier to see blackstone
- Prettier bedrock
- No breaking particles for: Netherrack, Blackstone, and Basalt

**If you plan to dig for Ancient Debris i recommend you also use [this!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ancient-debris-neon-outline)**

## Very cool gif
